description: Gap analysis between web app and React Native mobile-staff app. Identify all features in the web app that are missing in the mobile staff app, and create a detailed plan to close the gap.
steps: Analyze the web app's full feature set across all roles (admin, staff, delivery partner, packing staff, customer). Catalog every page, API endpoint, and capability.

Analyze the mobile-staff app's current capabilities: auth (phone OTP + email), admin (dashboard, orders, reports, settings), delivery (order detail, navigate, collect, complete), packing (order detail). Catalog every screen and feature.
Compare the two lists and identify gaps: features in web that are NOT in mobile-staff. Group by role (admin features, delivery features, packing features, manager features).

Create a detailed report at .agents/reports/web-vs-mobile-staff-gap-analysis.md with: Executive Summary, Feature Comparison Table (Feature | Web | Mobile | Gap), Detailed Gap List by Role, Priority Ranking (P0 critical, P1 important, P2 nice-to-have), Implementation Plan with estimated effort per feature.
The plan should include specific screens to add, API endpoints needed, and suggested architecture (shared API layer, Zustand stores, component structure).
acceptance_criteria: Report includes a feature comparison table
Report identifies all major feature gaps by role
Report includes a prioritized implementation plan
findings: Created 570-line gap analysis report. Identified 22 admin gaps, 5 delivery gaps, and 2 packing gaps. Report includes executive summary, feature comparison table (50 features), detailed gaps by role, P0/P1/P2 priority ranking, 3-phase implementation plan with effort estimates (70 dev-days total), suggested architecture (stores, components, API routes), and technical recommendations.
